definition: to keep something in your mind or bring it back to mind
examples: Please remember to call me later.
I remember meeting her years ago.
He could not remember the password.

definition: to make something clear by describing it
sentence: Can you _____ this rule to me?
examples: Can you explain this rule to me?
She explained how the machine works.
It is difficult to explain the problem briefly.

definition: to mention an idea for someone to consider
sentence: I would _____ taking the earlier train.
examples: I would suggest taking the earlier train.
She suggested a different approach.
Can you suggest a good restaurant?

definition: to succeed in doing something difficult
sentence: She managed to _____ the problem alone.
examples: She managed to solve the problem alone.
Can you manage the project by yourself?
He managed to finish before the deadline.

definition: to like one thing more than another
examples: I prefer tea to coffee.
She prefers working in the morning.
Would you prefer to sit inside?

definition: to be decided or influenced by something else
sentence: The result will _____ on your effort.
examples: The result will depend on your effort.
Prices depend on the season.
You can depend on her in an emergency.

definition: to make something ready for use or an event
sentence: We need to _____ for the meeting.
examples: We need to prepare for the meeting.
She prepared dinner for the family.
The team is preparing a presentation.

definition: to give permission for something to happen
sentence: The rules do not _____ food inside.
examples: The rules do not allow food inside.
This ticket allows museum entry.
My schedule does not allow much free time.

definition: to believe that something will happen
sentence: We _____ the bus to arrive soon.
examples: We expect the bus to arrive soon.
I did not expect such a quick reply.
The company expects sales to grow.

definition: to get something that someone gives or sends
examples: Did you receive my message?
She received a package yesterday.
You will receive an email confirmation.

definition: to find or learn something for the first time
sentence: They hope to _____ a better solution.
examples: They hope to discover a better solution.
We discovered a small error.
She discovered a new way to study.

definition: to think carefully about something before deciding
examples: You should consider all the possibilities.
We are considering moving abroad.
Please consider my proposal.

definition: to keep doing something without stopping
examples: Please continue reading the next paragraph.
The rain continued all night.
She continued working after dinner.

definition: to go to an event, meeting, or class
examples: I will attend the conference tomorrow.
Many people attended the event.
She attends an English class twice a week.

definition: to form a picture or idea in your mind
sentence: Can you _____ living in another country?
examples: Can you imagine living in another country?
I cannot imagine life without the internet.
She imagined running her own business.

definition: to keep someone or something safe from harm
examples: This case will protect your phone.
Sunscreen helps protect your skin.
The law protects consumers.

definition: to take the place of something old, broken, or missing
sentence: We need to _____ the damaged part.
examples: We need to replace the damaged part.
They replaced the old windows.
Can technology replace human judgment?
